title: Yoko Takahashi
wikitext:
[]: Yoko Takahashi             Quote Post by MisatoRitsukoFan » Mon Sep 13, 2010 3:38 pm Who else loves Yoko Takahashi?! I love her. Of course, her best known songs include Cruel Angel's Thesis Aoki Flamme Metamorphose Kokoro yo Genshi ni Modore Yoake Umarekuru Shoujo Kizu Darake No Yume Tamashii No Rufuran Fly Me To The Moon: Acid Bossa Version It's strange though, I feel like she's been typecast with Evangelion so much, that her other singles aren't as appreciated as CAT is. I'd probably be asking the stupidest question ever, but does she speak English? Also, has anyone ever met or seen her before? What is she like? Is she nice?

[]:             Quote Post by soul.assassin » Mon Sep 13, 2010 6:51 pm Dunno, but this might help you: http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/encyclopedia/people.php?id=4506 http://www.geneon-ent.co.jp/rondorobe/music/takahashi/

Of course, her best known songs include Cruel Angel's Thesis Aoki Flamme Metamorphose Kokoro yo Genshi ni Modore Yoake Umarekuru Shoujo Kizu Darake No Yume Tamashii No Rufuran Fly Me To The Moon: Acid Bossa Version It's strange though, I feel like she's been typecast with Evangelion so much, that her other singles aren't as appreciated as CAT is. I'd probably be asking the stupidest question ever, but does she speak English? Also, has anyone ever met or seen her before? What is she like? Is she nice?
